name: Revenue Model Clarity
description: Clear articulation of how the business generates revenue, including pricing tiers, monetization strategy, and value exchange.

name: Unit Economics Tracking
description: Measurement and optimization of per-unit profitability including CAC, LTV, gross margin, and contribution margin.

name: Cash Flow Management
description: Forecasting, monitoring, and optimizing cash inflows and outflows to ensure operational continuity.

name: Financial Planning & Analysis
description: Budgeting, forecasting, variance analysis, and scenario planning to guide strategic decisions.

name: Pricing Strategy
description: Data-driven pricing decisions aligned with market positioning, cost structure, and customer willingness to pay.

name: Cost Structure Optimization
description: Systematic identification and reduction of unnecessary costs while preserving value delivery capacity.

name: Revenue Diversification
description: Reducing concentration risk by developing multiple revenue streams and customer segments.

name: Financial Reporting & Controls
description: Accurate, timely financial reporting with appropriate internal controls and audit readiness.

name: Capital Allocation Discipline
description: Structured approach to investing capital across initiatives based on expected returns and strategic fit.

name: Investor & Stakeholder Communication
description: Transparent, regular communication of financial performance and strategy to investors and stakeholders.

name: Product Vision & Strategy
description: A compelling, documented product vision that aligns the team and guides roadmap decisions.

name: Customer Discovery Process
description: Systematic methods for understanding customer needs, pain points, and jobs-to-be-done.

name: Product Roadmap Management
description: Prioritized, outcome-driven roadmap that balances customer needs, business goals, and technical debt.

name: Feature Prioritization Framework
description: Consistent, transparent methodology for deciding what to build next based on impact and effort.

name: Product-Market Fit Measurement
description: Quantitative and qualitative signals confirming the product solves a real problem for a defined market.

name: User Experience Design
description: Intentional design of user interactions that reduce friction and increase engagement and satisfaction.

name: Product Analytics & Instrumentation
description: Data collection and analysis of product usage patterns to inform decisions and measure outcomes.

name: Competitive Intelligence
description: Ongoing monitoring and analysis of competitor offerings, positioning, and market movements.

name: Product Feedback Loop
description: Structured collection, synthesis, and action on customer feedback across all touchpoints.

name: Product Quality Standards
description: Defined quality benchmarks, acceptance criteria, and release gates that protect customer experience.

name: Innovation Pipeline
description: Systematic approach to exploring new product opportunities beyond the current roadmap.

name: Ideal Customer Profile Definition
description: Clear, data-backed definition of the target customer including firmographics, behavior, and buying signals.

name: Sales Process & Methodology
description: Documented, repeatable sales process from lead qualification through close with defined stages and criteria.

name: Pipeline Management & Forecasting
description: Accurate visibility into sales pipeline health, velocity, and revenue forecasting.

name: Lead Generation & Qualification
description: Systematic generation of qualified leads through inbound and outbound channels.

name: Sales Enablement
description: Tools, content, training, and playbooks that equip the sales team to sell effectively.

name: Customer Onboarding
description: Structured process to transition new customers from sale to active, successful usage.

name: Account Management & Expansion
description: Proactive management of existing accounts to maximize retention, satisfaction, and expansion revenue.

name: Channel & Partnership Strategy
description: Identification and management of indirect sales channels and strategic partnerships.

name: Sales Compensation & Incentives
description: Compensation structures aligned with company goals that motivate desired selling behaviors.

name: CRM & Sales Technology Stack
description: Effective use of CRM and sales tools to track activity, manage relationships, and report performance.

name: Brand Positioning & Messaging
description: Clear, differentiated brand positioning with consistent messaging across all channels.

name: Demand Generation Strategy
description: Integrated approach to generating awareness and qualified demand through multiple channels.

name: Content Strategy & Production
description: Planned, consistent creation of valuable content that serves audience needs and business goals.

name: Digital Marketing Operations
description: Efficient execution of digital marketing campaigns including SEO, SEM, email, and social.

name: Marketing Analytics & Attribution
description: Measurement of marketing effectiveness with clear attribution of spend to pipeline and revenue.

name: Customer Advocacy & Referrals
description: Programs that turn satisfied customers into advocates who generate referrals and social proof.

name: Market Research & Segmentation
description: Ongoing research into market dynamics, customer segments, and emerging opportunities.

name: Marketing Technology Stack
description: Effective use of marketing automation, analytics, and campaign management tools.

name: Public Relations & Communications
description: Strategic management of public perception, media relations, and crisis communications.

name: Event & Community Strategy
description: Engagement with target audiences through events, communities, and experiential marketing.

name: Talent Acquisition & Recruiting
description: Ability to attract, evaluate, and hire the right talent at the pace the business requires.

name: Onboarding & Ramp-Up
description: Structured process to bring new hires to full productivity with clear milestones and support.

name: Performance Management
description: Regular, constructive performance evaluation and feedback cycles that drive improvement.

name: Compensation & Benefits
description: Competitive, equitable compensation structure that attracts and retains talent.

name: Culture & Values Alignment
description: Explicitly defined and actively maintained culture that guides behavior and decision-making.

name: Learning & Development
description: Investment in employee growth through training, mentoring, and career development paths.

name: Organizational Design
description: Structure, roles, and reporting lines aligned with strategy and scaled appropriately for stage.

name: Employee Engagement & Retention
description: Active measurement and improvement of employee satisfaction, engagement, and retention.

name: Succession Planning
description: Identification and development of future leaders for critical roles.

name: Diversity, Equity & Inclusion
description: Intentional practices to build a diverse, equitable, and inclusive workplace.

name: Architecture & Technical Design
description: Intentional system architecture that supports current needs and anticipated scale.

name: Engineering Standards & Practices
description: Coding standards, review processes, and engineering practices that ensure quality and consistency.

name: Technical Debt Management
description: Systematic identification, tracking, and reduction of technical debt.

name: Security & Compliance
description: Proactive security practices, vulnerability management, and regulatory compliance.

name: Infrastructure & Scalability
description: Reliable, scalable infrastructure that supports business growth without performance degradation.

name: CI/CD & Deployment Practices
description: Automated build, test, and deployment pipelines that enable frequent, reliable releases.

name: Monitoring & Observability
description: Comprehensive monitoring, logging, and alerting that enables rapid detection and resolution of issues.

name: Data Architecture & Management
description: Structured approach to data storage, access, quality, and governance.

name: API Strategy & Integration
description: Well-designed APIs and integration patterns that enable internal and external connectivity.

name: Technology Vendor Management
description: Strategic selection, management, and evaluation of technology vendors and platforms.

name: Disaster Recovery & Business Continuity
description: Tested plans and procedures for maintaining operations during and after disruptive events.

name: Project Delivery Methodology
description: Consistent, appropriate methodology for planning and delivering projects on time and within scope.

name: Resource Planning & Allocation
description: Effective matching of available resources to project and operational demands.

name: Quality Assurance & Testing
description: Systematic testing and quality verification processes that catch defects before customers do.

name: Process Documentation & Standardization
description: Documented, standardized processes for repeatable operations.

name: Operational Efficiency & Automation
description: Identification and elimination of waste through process improvement and automation.

name: Service Level Management
description: Defined, measured, and managed service levels for internal and external customers.

name: Incident Management
description: Structured response to incidents with root cause analysis and prevention of recurrence.

name: Change Management
description: Controlled process for introducing changes to minimize disruption and risk.

name: Customer Support Operations
description: Efficient, high-quality customer support with clear escalation paths and resolution tracking.

name: Supply Chain & Vendor Operations
description: Management of external suppliers and operational dependencies for reliability and cost.

name: Strategic Planning Process
description: Regular, structured strategic planning that aligns the organization around shared goals and priorities.

name: Decision-Making Framework
description: Clear, documented frameworks for how decisions are made, by whom, and with what inputs.

name: Board & Advisor Management
description: Effective management of board relationships, reporting, and advisory input.

name: Risk Management & Mitigation
description: Proactive identification, assessment, and mitigation of business risks.

name: Executive Team Alignment
description: Cohesive executive team with shared understanding of strategy, roles, and accountability.

name: Meeting Cadence & Governance Rhythms
description: Structured meeting cadences (weekly, monthly, quarterly) that maintain alignment and momentum.

name: Delegation & Authority Matrix
description: Clear delegation of authority with defined decision rights at each organizational level.

name: OKR & Goal Setting
description: Objectives and key results or equivalent goal framework that cascades from strategy to execution.

name: Legal & Regulatory Compliance
description: Proactive management of legal obligations, contracts, and regulatory requirements.

name: Stakeholder Communication & Transparency
description: Regular, transparent communication with all stakeholders including employees, investors, and partners.
